workflow.name: Medical Evidence Research
workflow.description: Ricerca evidenze mediche su PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC e The Lens con sintesi clinica via Claude Sonnet. Basato su github.com/Pinperepette/Medical-Research

blocks.note: Blocco iniziale: raccolta query medica e lingua

EN.label:
Medical Evidence Research

Enter your clinical question to search PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC and The Lens. AI will analyze the results and generate a clinical synthesis.

IT.label:
Ricerca Evidenze Mediche

Inserisci la tua domanda clinica per cercare su PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC e The Lens. L'AI analizzerà i risultati e genererà una sintesi clinica.
Inserisci la tua domanda di ricerca medica...

elements.note: Lingua risultati: en, it, es, fr, de
Optional: The Lens API token from lens.org/lens/user/subscriptions

EN.label: The Lens API token (optional, from lens.org)

IT.label: Token API The Lens (opzionale, da lens.org)

blocks.description: AI QUERY PLANNING - Claude genera query ottimizzate
blocks.exec:
<?php
$systemPrompt = "You are a medical literature search expert. Given a medical research question, generate optimized search queries for four databases. You MUST respond ONLY with valid JSON, no other text. Use this exact format:
{
  "pubmed": ["query1 with MeSH terms", "query2"],
  "clinicaltrials": ["short query"],
  "europepmc": ["free text query1", "query2"],
  "lens": ["keyword query1", "keyword query2"]
}

Rules:
1. ALWAYS generate queries in English regardless of input language
2. For PubMed: use MeSH terms, combine with OR to broaden, AND to narrow. Generate 2-3 queries.
3. For ClinicalTrials.gov: use short simple terms (1-3 words). Generate 1-2 queries.
4. For Europe PMC: use free-text, open-access oriented. Generate 2 queries.
5. For The Lens: use keyword queries, similar to free text. Generate 1-2 queries.
6. Mix broad queries (2-3 terms) with more specific ones.";

$F->initAiAgent($systemPrompt);
$userMsg = "Generate optimized search queries for the following medical research question:

" . $query;
$F->sendToAi($userMsg, '$planned_queries', 4);
$F->setExit(0);
?>
blocks.note: Claude Sonnet (provider 4) genera query ottimizzate per PubMed, ClinicalTrials, Europe PMC, The Lens

EN.label: Planning optimized search queries with AI...

IT.label: Pianificazione query di ricerca ottimizzate con AI...

blocks.exec:
<?php
// Parse AI-generated queries
$queries = json_decode($planned_queries, true);
if (!$queries || !is_array($queries)) {
    $queries = ["pubmed" => [$query], "clinicaltrials" => [$query], "europepmc" => [$query], "lens" => [$query]];
}

$allArticles = [];
$seenIds = [];

// --- PUBMED SEARCH ---
foreach ($queries["pubmed"] ?? [$query] as $q) {
    $searchUrl = "https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/esearch.fcgi?"
        . "db=pubmed&term=" . urlencode($q) . "&retmode=json&retmax=10&sort=relevance";
    $searchResult = $F->getResultFromHttpApi($searchUrl, "GET");
    $searchData = json_decode($searchResult, true);
    $pmids = $searchData["esearchresult"]["idlist"] ?? [];
    if (empty($pmids)) continue;

    $fetchUrl = "https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?"
        . "db=pubmed&id=" . implode(",", $pmids) . "&retmode=xml";
    $xmlResult = $F->getResultFromHttpApi($fetchUrl, "GET");
    if (!empty($xmlResult)) {
        $xml = @simplexml_load_string($xmlResult);
        if ($xml) {
            foreach ($xml->PubmedArticle as $article) {
                $pmid = (string)($article->MedlineCitation->PMID ?? "");
                if (isset($seenIds[$pmid])) continue;
                $seenIds[$pmid] = true;
                $title = (string)($article->MedlineCitation->Article->ArticleTitle ?? "");
                $abstract = "";
                if (isset($article->MedlineCitation->Article->Abstract->AbstractText)) {
                    foreach ($article->MedlineCitation->Article->Abstract->AbstractText as $text) {
                        $label = (string)($text['Label'] ?? "");
                        if (!empty($label)) $abstract .= strtoupper($label) . ": ";
                        $abstract .= (string)$text . " ";
                    }
                }
                $journal = (string)($article->MedlineCitation->Article->Journal->Title ?? "");
                $year = (string)($article->MedlineCitation->Article->Journal->JournalIssue->PubDate->Year ?? "");
                $authors = [];
                if (isset($article->MedlineCitation->Article->AuthorList->Author)) {
                    $cnt = 0;
                    foreach ($article->MedlineCitation->Article->AuthorList->Author as $auth) {
                        if ($cnt >= 5) break;
                        $ln = (string)($auth->LastName ?? "");
                        $ini = (string)($auth->Initials ?? "");
                        if (!empty($ln)) $authors[] = $ln . " " . $ini;
                        $cnt++;
                    }
                }
                $allArticles[] = ["source" => "PubMed", "id" => $pmid, "title" => $title,
                    "abstract" => trim($abstract), "authors" => implode(", ", $authors),
                    "journal" => $journal, "year" => $year,
                    "url" => "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/" . $pmid . "/"];
            }
        }
    }
    usleep(500000);
}

// --- CLINICALTRIALS.GOV SEARCH ---
foreach ($queries["clinicaltrials"] ?? [$query] as $q) {
    $ctUrl = "https://clinicaltrials.gov/api/v2/studies?"
        . "query.term=" . urlencode($q) . "&pageSize=10&format=json";
    $ctResult = $F->getResultFromHttpApi($ctUrl, "GET");
    $ctData = json_decode($ctResult, true);
    foreach ($ctData["studies"] ?? [] as $study) {
        $proto = $study["protocolSection"] ?? [];
        $ident = $proto["identificationModule"] ?? [];
        $desc = $proto["descriptionModule"] ?? [];
        $status = $proto["statusModule"] ?? [];
        $nctId = $ident["nctId"] ?? "";
        if (isset($seenIds[$nctId])) continue;
        $seenIds[$nctId] = true;
        $ctAbstract = $desc["briefSummary"] ?? "";
        $conditions = $proto["conditionsModule"]["conditions"] ?? [];
        if (!empty($conditions)) $ctAbstract .= " | Conditions: " . implode(", ", $conditions);
        $overallStatus = $status["overallStatus"] ?? "Unknown";
        $allArticles[] = ["source" => "ClinicalTrials.gov", "id" => $nctId,
            "title" => $ident["officialTitle"] ?? $ident["briefTitle"] ?? "",
            "abstract" => trim($ctAbstract), "authors" => "",
            "journal" => "ClinicalTrials.gov (" . $overallStatus . ")",
            "year" => substr($status["studyFirstPostDateStruct"]["date"] ?? "", 0, 4),
            "url" => "https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/" . $nctId];
    }
}

// --- EUROPE PMC SEARCH ---
foreach ($queries["europepmc"] ?? [$query] as $q) {
    $epmcUrl = "https://www.ebi.ac.uk/europepmc/webservices/rest/search?"
        . "query=" . urlencode($q) . "&resultType=core&pageSize=10&format=json";
    $epmcResult = $F->getResultFromHttpApi($epmcUrl, "GET");
    $epmcData = json_decode($epmcResult, true);
    foreach ($epmcData["resultList"]["result"] ?? [] as $result) {
        $epmcId = $result["pmid"] ?? $result["pmcid"] ?? "";
        if (isset($seenIds[$epmcId])) continue;
        if (!empty($result["pmid"]) && isset($seenIds[$result["pmid"]])) continue;
        $seenIds[$epmcId] = true;
        if (!empty($result["pmid"])) $seenIds[$result["pmid"]] = true;
        $allArticles[] = ["source" => "Europe PMC", "id" => $epmcId,
            "title" => $result["title"] ?? "",
            "abstract" => $result["abstractText"] ?? "",
            "authors" => $result["authorString"] ?? "",
            "journal" => $result["journalTitle"] ?? "",
            "year" => $result["pubYear"] ?? "",
            "url" => !empty($result["pmid"]) ? "https://europepmc.org/article/MED/" . $result["pmid"] : "https://europepmc.org/article/PMC/" . ($result["pmcid"] ?? "")];
    }
    usleep(500000);
}

// --- THE LENS SEARCH ---
if (!empty($lens_token)) {
    foreach ($queries["lens"] ?? [$query] as $q) {
        $lensBody = json_encode(["query" => $q, "size" => 10, "include" => ["lens_id", "title", "abstract", "authors", "source", "year_published", "external_ids", "scholarly_citations_count"]]);
        $ch = curl_init("https://api.lens.org/scholarly/search");
        curl_setopt_array($ch, [CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true, CURLOPT_POST => true, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => $lensBody, CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => ["Authorization: Bearer " . $lens_token, "Content-Type: application/json"]]);
        $lensResult = curl_exec($ch);
        curl_close($ch);
        $lensData = json_decode($lensResult, true);
        foreach ($lensData["data"] ?? [] as $item) {
            $lensId = $item["lens_id"] ?? "";
            if (isset($seenIds[$lensId])) continue;
            $pmid = "";
            foreach ($item["external_ids"] ?? [] as $eid) {
                if (($eid["type"] ?? "") === "pmid") $pmid = $eid["value"] ?? "";
            }
            if (!empty($pmid) && isset($seenIds[$pmid])) continue;
            $seenIds[$lensId] = true;
            if (!empty($pmid)) $seenIds[$pmid] = true;
            $authors = [];
            foreach ($item["authors"] ?? [] as $auth) {
                if (count($authors) >= 5) break;
                $fn = $auth["first_name"] ?? "";
                $ln = $auth["last_name"] ?? "";
                if (!empty($ln)) $authors[] = $ln . " " . substr($fn, 0, 1);
            }
            $allArticles[] = ["source" => "The Lens", "id" => $lensId, "title" => $item["title"] ?? "", "abstract" => $item["abstract"] ?? "", "authors" => implode(", ", $authors), "journal" => $item["source"]["title"] ?? "", "year" => $item["year_published"] ?? "", "url" => "https://www.lens.org/lens/scholar/article/" . $lensId];
        }
        usleep(500000);
    }
}

// --- Prepare for AI analysis ---
$articleCount = count($allArticles);
$F->addProcessVariable('$article_count', strval($articleCount));

$articleSummary = "";
$cnt = 0;
foreach ($allArticles as $art) {
    $cnt++;
    if ($cnt > 25) break;
    $articleSummary .= "---\nARTICLE $cnt [{$art['source']}]\n";
    $articleSummary .= "ID: {$art['id']}\nTitle: {$art['title']}\n";
    $articleSummary .= "Journal: {$art['journal']} | Year: {$art['year']}\n";
    if (!empty($art['authors'])) $articleSummary .= "Authors: {$art['authors']}\n";
    $articleSummary .= "Abstract: " . substr($art['abstract'], 0, 600) . "\n\n";
}

$langMap = ["it" => "Italian", "en" => "English", "es" => "Spanish", "fr" => "French", "de" => "German"];
$langName = $langMap[$language] ?? "English";

$analysisSystem = "You are a medical research analyst. Analyze scientific articles and produce a clinical evidence synthesis.\n\nRULES:\n1. Respond ONLY in $langName\n2. Output ONLY valid JSON (no markdown fences)\n3. Evidence levels: 1=Systematic Review/Meta-analysis, 2=RCT, 3=Cohort/Case-control, 4=Case series, 5=Expert opinion\n\nJSON format:\n{\n  \"synthesis\": {\n    \"key_findings\": \"...\",\n    \"therapeutic_options\": \"...\",\n    \"clinical_trials\": \"...\",\n    \"evidence_gaps\": \"...\",\n    \"recommendation\": \"...\"\n  },\n  \"top_articles\": [{\n    \"rank\": 1, \"source\": \"PubMed\", \"id\": \"12345\", \"title\": \"...\",\n    \"relevance_score\": 95, \"evidence_level\": 2,\n    \"article_type\": \"trial|review|meta-analysis|case_study|guideline|observational\",\n    \"summary\": \"...\"\n  }],\n  \"suggested_queries\": [\"query1\", \"query2\", \"query3\"]\n}";

$F->initAiAgent($analysisSystem);
$analysisPrompt = "Research question: $query\nFound $articleCount articles across PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC, The Lens.\n\nAnalyze and rank articles, then generate a clinical synthesis.\n\n$articleSummary";
$F->sendToAi($analysisPrompt, '$analysis_result', 4);
$F->setExit(0);
?>
blocks.note: Interroga PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC, The Lens via API REST, poi invia tutto a Claude per analisi e sintesi

EN.label: Searching PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC, The Lens and analyzing results...

IT.label: Ricerca su PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC, The Lens e analisi risultati in corso...

blocks.exec:
["title" => "Sintesi delle Evidenze Cliniche", "query_label" => "Domanda", "articles_found" => "Articoli trovati", "key_findings" => "Risultati Principali", "therapeutic" => "Opzioni Terapeutiche", "trials" => "Trial Clinici Rilevanti", "gaps" => "Lacune nelle Evidenze", "recommendation" => "Raccomandazione Clinica", "top_articles" => "Articoli Migliori", "score" => "Punteggio", "evidence" => "Livello Evidenza", "suggested" => "Query Suggerite", "sources" => "Fonti"], "en" => ["title" => "Clinical Evidence Synthesis", "query_label" => "Question", "articles_found" => "Articles found", "key_findings" => "Key Findings", "therapeutic" => "Therapeutic Options", "trials" => "Relevant Clinical Trials", "gaps" => "Evidence Gaps", "recommendation" => "Clinical Recommendation", "top_articles" => "Top Ranked Articles", "score" => "Score", "evidence" => "Evidence Level", "suggested" => "Suggested Queries", "sources" => "Sources"] ]; $labels = $langLabels[$language] ?? $langLabels["en"]; $analysisRaw = trim($analysis_result); if (strpos($analysisRaw, "```") !== false) { preg_match('/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/', $analysisRaw, $matches); if (isset($matches[1])) $analysisRaw = $matches[1]; } $analysis = json_decode($analysisRaw, true); $html = "
"; $html .= "

" . $labels["title"] . "

"; $html .= "

" . $labels["query_label"] . ": " . htmlspecialchars($query) . " | " . $labels["articles_found"] . ": " . $article_count . "

"; if ($analysis && isset($analysis["synthesis"])) { $synth = $analysis["synthesis"]; $sections = ["key_findings" => $synth["key_findings"] ?? "", "therapeutic" => $synth["therapeutic_options"] ?? "", "trials" => $synth["clinical_trials"] ?? "", "gaps" => $synth["evidence_gaps"] ?? "", "recommendation" => $synth["recommendation"] ?? ""]; foreach ($sections as $key => $content) { if (!empty($content)) { $bg = ($key === "recommendation") ? "#eaf2f8" : "#fff"; $bc = ($key === "recommendation") ? "#2980b9" : "#ddd"; $html .= "
"; $html .= "

" . $labels[$key] . "

"; $html .= "

" . nl2br(htmlspecialchars($content)) . "

"; } } if (isset($analysis["top_articles"]) && is_array($analysis["top_articles"])) { $html .= "

" . $labels["top_articles"] . "

"; foreach ($analysis["top_articles"] as $art) { $score = intval($art["relevance_score"] ?? 0); $sc = ($score >= 80) ? "#27ae60" : (($score >= 60) ? "#f39c12" : (($score >= 40) ? "#e67e22" : "#e74c3c")); $html .= "
"; $html .= "
#" . ($art["rank"] ?? "") . " [" . ($art["source"] ?? "") . "] "; $html .= "" . $labels["score"] . ": $score/100 "; $html .= "" . $labels["evidence"] . ": " . ($art["evidence_level"] ?? "N/A") . ""; if (!empty($art["article_type"])) $html .= " " . $art["article_type"] . ""; $html .= "
"; $html .= "" . htmlspecialchars($art["title"] ?? "") . "
"; $html .= "" . htmlspecialchars($art["summary"] ?? "") . "
"; } } if (isset($analysis["suggested_queries"]) && is_array($analysis["suggested_queries"])) { $html .= "
"; $html .= "

" . $labels["suggested"] . "

    "; foreach ($analysis["suggested_queries"] as $sq) $html .= "
  • " . htmlspecialchars($sq) . "
    • "; $html .= "

"; $html .= "

"; } $html .= "
"; $html .= "" . $labels["sources"] . ": PubMed (NCBI), ClinicalTrials.gov, Europe PMC (EBI), The Lens (lens.org) | AI: Claude Sonnet
"; $F->addProcessVariable('$result_html', $html); ?>
blocks.note: Formatta e visualizza la sintesi clinica con articoli classificati
